section_name: Pedestrians’ right of way on sidewalks
text: The driver of a vehicle emerging from or entering an alleyway, building, private road or driveway shall yield the right of way to any pedestrian approaching on any sidewalk extending across such alleyway, building entrance, road or driveway.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 27. Pedestrians' Rights & Duties
##### § 1151-A — Pedestrians’ right of way on sidewalks

The driver of a vehicle emerging from or entering an alleyway, building, private road or driveway shall yield the right of way to any pedestrian approaching on any sidewalk extending across such alleyway, building entrance, road or driveway.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
